hook.text: Struggling at work with endometriosis? Here's what you need to know
hook.emotional_mechanism_raw: creates empathy and curiosity about solutions
hook.target_audience_raw: people with endometriosis struggling at work

main_claim.text: Work doesn't have to be another battle on top of endometriosis.

supporting_explanation.summary: Examples of workplace accommodations include correct chair, work from home, parking spot, rest times, rest chair, and access to good nutrition.

funnel_rationale: Provides actionable advice for those already diagnosed to improve their work life, addressing a specific pain point after diagnosis.
